comments.text: Currently the best known lower bound is a slight improvement of Dumitrescu’s result. Nivasch, Pach, Pinchasi, and Zerbib proved that\[ f(n) \ge \left(\tfrac{13}{36} + \tfrac{1}{22701}\right) n +O(1). \]Reference: G. Nivasch, J. Pach, R. Pinchasi, and S. Zerbib, The number of distinct distances from a vertex of a convex polygon, J. Computational Geometry 4 (2013), 1–12. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
